title: Close the M2 work logistics gate
summary: Close M2 only after the work/logistics vertical-slice evidence is verified, integrated and documented without starting M3.
acceptance: All M2 task packets WM-0033 through WM-0042 are verified integrated and done before closeout completion
Closeout report records final scenario hashes artifact paths benchmark comparison Worker parity save/replay evidence residual risks and known warnings
20 actors hauling/building and 100 path requests under versioned invalidation pass the documented M2 gates
Roadmap and milestone status are updated narrowly to reflect M2 closeout evidence
No M3 task is created promoted claimed or implemented by this closeout task

history.details: Created by WM-0032 M2 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Close M2 with evidence while keeping M3 blocked.
forbiddenPaths: coordination/tasks/WM-0044*.json unless explicitly reviewed as non-M3 follow-up
benchmarkImpact: Final M2 benchmark artifact comparison and gate verdict; no threshold changes.
reviewRouting: Project-director completes to reviewer; integration and done remain separate taskctl steps after reviewer verification.
rollbackModel: Leave M2 open, do not promote M3, and route blockers to the responsible owner task.
ownerGate: Do not fix product code in closeout
Confirm every upstream task is verified integrated and done
Run every required check before taskctl complete

sparkEligibility.reason: Milestone closeout and final coordination gates cannot be assigned to Spark.
